assetId.title: assetId
assetId.description: The Salesforce ID of the asset requiring replacement.

accountId.title: accountId
accountId.description: The Salesforce ID of the customer account.

contactId.title: contactId
contactId.description: The Salesforce ID of the customer contact.

diagnosis.title: diagnosis
diagnosis.description: The diagnostic assessment from the asset health check.

severity.title: severity
severity.description: The severity level of the issue requiring replacement.

recommendedAction.title: recommendedAction
recommendedAction.description: The recommended action from the health diagnosis.

vehicleName.title: vehicleName
vehicleName.description: The name of the vehicle associated with the asset.

customerName.title: customerName
customerName.description: The name of the customer for the replacement case.
